org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

Class ControlPoint

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.math.continous.object2d.Tuple2f<Point2D>
      • org.arakhne.afc.math.continous.object2d.Point2f
        • org.arakhne.afc.math.continous.object2d.UnmodifiablePoint2f
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.ControlPoint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable, Point2D, Tuple2D<Point2D>

     class ControlPoint
extends UnmodifiablePoint2f
    This is the implementation of an edge control point. It is a Point2D that can be modified only from an edge.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig
